article_id: Article 1. Name and Form of the State
text_snippet: Libya is a free, independent, and indivisible state. It shall not relinquish any part of its sovereignty nor its territory. It shall henceforth be called the Libyan Republic.

text_snippet: The State shall be committed to guaranteeing the health, social, educational, economic, and entertainment rights of persons with disability. The State shall protect persons with disability and create

The right to litigation shall be guaranteed for all. Every person shall have the right to a fair trial before his normal judge and within a reasonable period in which all guarantees shall be provided.

article_id: Article 72. Principle of Criminal Legitimacy and Origin of Acquittal
text_snippet: Crimes shall be classified into felonies, misdemeanors, and violations. There shall be no felony or misdemeanor except by law; there shall be no sentence depriving them of freedom for violations; ther

article_id: Article 75. Restrictions on Exercising Rights and Freedoms
text_snippet: Any restriction of rights and freedoms must be necessary, clear, defined, and proportionate to the interest to be protected and the characteristics of democratic society. Going back on legal guarantee

article_id: Article 76. Drafting Legislative and Executive Policies
text_snippet: All legislative and executive policies and development programs shall be founded on the protection and promotion of human rights. In this regard, the State shall periodically evaluate its legislation

article_id: Article 99. By-laws of the Two Councils
